package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for persistence_model_contains_http_form_or_uri_tags: Persistence models that are tied to form or URI binding tags.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule113NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule113NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule113NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario113Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule113NegativeService, input Rule113NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
